description: AI Web summarizes a live webpage. User opens AI Web, navigates to a Wikipedia article, taps the wand button, and an AI-generated summary appears. Works in simulator with network access + mChatAI Cloud configured.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Reading the web shouldn't mean reading everything.

scenes.name: Tap Web AI
scenes.narration: Web AI turns any page into a quick read.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Web AI is a browser with a summary button built in.

scenes.name: Type a URL
scenes.narration: Open any webpage - here's the Wikipedia article on artificial intelligence.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Pull up any webpage that interests you.

scenes.name: Tap the wand
scenes.narration: Tap the wand to let AI distill it for you.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap the wand and AI condenses the page.

scenes.name: Show the summary
scenes.narration: A few seconds later you have the key points without the slog.
scenes.fallbackNarration: AI extracts the key points without the slog.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
